$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for summary-agent responses (issue #436, sdlc fix). ABOUTME: Minimal + best-effort; a summary miss never fails a fix. Draft 2020-12, extra fields allowed.
title: SummaryAgentResponse
description: Formatted fix report returned by the summary agent dispatched by `sdlc fix`.

summary_markdown.description: The rendered markdown summary of the completed fix.
